faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

items.how_long_q: How long does it take to create a website?
items.how_long_a: The Essential plan usually takes 2–3 weeks from the moment we have everything we need from you. The Recommended plan is ready in 10 days. The main factor influencing duration is how fast we receive your content — logo, photos, and ideas about what you want to communicate. We guide you step by step for everything we need before we start.
items.what_to_provide_q: What do I need to provide to start?
items.what_to_provide_a: Less than you'd think. Mainly the logo, any photos of the business or team, and a general idea of services and prices. If you don't have professional photos, we find solutions — we tell you exactly what works best in your case during the initial discussion.
items.changes_after_launch_q: Can I make changes after the site launch?
items.changes_after_launch_a: Yes — every plan includes one month of unlimited changes after launch. If something needs to be adjusted, rewritten, or moved, tell us and we'll take care of it. After this period, changes can be included in the maintenance subscription or billed separately, depending on complexity.
items.react_vs_wordpress_q: Why does a custom React site cost more than a WordPress one?
items.react_vs_wordpress_a: WordPress sites are built on templates — they are faster to make, but you always function within the limits of an existing system. What we build is made from scratch, which means higher speed, behavior tailored exactly to your business, and fewer security issues or limitations caused by plugins. The difference is visible especially in performance and Google rankings.
items.ownership_q: Who owns the site after completion?
items.ownership_a: You own it completely. After completion and payment of the project, the code and all content belong to you. We offer all necessary files and access. The only recurring cost is hosting, which we offer between €30–50/month — but you can choose any provider you want.
items.seo_results_time_q: How long until SEO results appear?
items.seo_results_time_a: It depends on the competition and the starting point. Most clients start seeing ranking changes in the first 30–45 days. Significant traffic usually appears in months 2 and 3. That's why the Growth plan has a 90-day guarantee — it's a realistic interval for results.
items.guarantee_q: What does the 90-day guarantee mean — what happens if it's not delivered?
items.guarantee_a: If we don't reach the Google top 5 for agreed keywords in 90 days, we continue to work at no additional cost until we reach that objective. We don't stop and don't make excuses — we continue until we succeed. The guarantee applies only to keywords established together at the start.
items.new_site_for_seo_q: Do I need a new site for SEO?
items.new_site_for_seo_a: Not necessarily. We can also work with your existing site if it's technically well-built. We analyze it during the initial discussion and give you an honest evaluation. If there are problems that could affect results, we tell you from the start.
items.monthly_seo_necessity_q: Why do I need monthly SEO — can't it be done just once?
items.monthly_seo_necessity_a: SEO is not a one-time action — it's a continuous process. Competition works constantly, and Google changes often. An optimization done just once helps in the short term, but without steady work, results decrease over time.
items.website_vs_seo_q: Do I need a website and SEO or just one of them?
items.website_vs_seo_a: It depends on your situation. If you don't have a website or your current one isn't efficient, that's the first step. If the site exists but isn't found on Google, then SEO is the solution. The Recommended plan already includes the SEO base, and for continuous growth, you can add the monthly subscription.
items.location_romania_hungary_q: You are in Romania — do you also work with businesses in Hungary?
items.location_romania_hungary_a: Yes, we work with businesses in both Romania and Hungary. Language is not a problem — we manage projects for the Hungarian market and understand the local context. Everything is conducted remote, so location doesn't affect collaboration.
items.freelancer_vs_agency_q: What is the difference compared to a freelancer or a local agency?
items.freelancer_vs_agency_a: A freelancer is usually specialized in one area — design, development, or SEO. Large agencies may involve transferring the project to different people. We work as a small and focused team, where the same people involved in analysis also handle implementation, integrating design, development, and SEO into a unified process.
items.payment_terms_q: How is payment made and are there contracts?
items.payment_terms_a: Web projects are paid in two installments — 50% in advance and 50% at the end, before delivery. SEO services are invoiced monthly, without a long-term contract — you can cancel with 30 days' notice. We accept card payments (Stripe) or bank transfers.
items.free_mockup_details_q: What does the free mockup include?
items.free_mockup_details_a: It's a real design of the main page — not sketches or wireframes. It's based on your brand, services, and market. You see exactly what the site will look like before you decide. If you don't want to continue, there are no costs or obligations.
